title: senecio morenonis var. typicus
intro: Senecio morenonis var. typicus is a variant of the Senecio morenonis plant, a member of the dandelion-like plant family known for its medicinal properties. This plant is native to the western United States, where it has been traditionally used by Native Americans for its medicinal and culinary purposes. The leaves and flowers of Senecio morenonis var. typicus contain sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
